curation_policy.scope: Manually curated classification and public metadata index for bispecific/multispecific antibodies and ADC designs.
curation_policy.statistics_boundary: Counts are based only on records included in this curated file; this is not a complete global census.
curation_policy.copyright_boundary: Store metadata, source titles, identifiers and URLs only; do not store full copyrighted articles or paid news text.
curation_policy.review_boundary: Draft and metadata-only entries require scientific and IP review before use in decisions.
curation_policy.patent_boundary: Patent links are evidence pointers, not FTO or legal opinions.

taxonomy.design_rationale: 用一个肿瘤/疾病导航靶点定位目标细胞，同时用一个免疫臂招募或调节免疫效应。

taxonomy.category_name: 双抗/多抗-多导航-单免疫
taxonomy.design_rationale: 通过双抗原或双表位确认提高肿瘤选择性，降低单靶点逃逸。

taxonomy.category_name: 双抗/多抗-单导航-多免疫臂
taxonomy.design_rationale: 在单一定位线索下组合激活、共刺激、解除抑制或NK/T细胞双效应。
limitations: 免疫臂协同剂量窗口窄

taxonomy.category_name: 双抗/多抗-多导航-多免疫臂
taxonomy.design_rationale: 同时提升定位选择性和免疫效应强度，是复杂多抗设计范式。
limitations: 安全性窗口需严格验证

taxonomy.design_rationale: 用一个抗原定位肿瘤细胞并递送一种细胞毒/功能载荷。
双靶点或双表位提高选择性、亲和力、内化或抗原逃逸鲁棒性。
同一靶向抗体递送多种作用机制载荷，用于协同杀伤或降低耐药。
双/多靶向定位叠加多机制载荷，是高复杂度下一代ADC概念。
limitations: 安全性和释放窗口难验证
